agents.name: Deal Analyst
agents.description: Monitors meetings and emails to extract deal intelligence, create opportunities, and draft notes

agents.name: Order Processor
agents.description: Reads purchase orders from emails and SMS to auto-create draft orders

agents.name: Pricing Scout
agents.description: Monitors market communications for competitive pricing intelligence

activities.summary: Discussed Q2 supply needs. Customer expressed interest in expanding to PVC rigid sheet for their new construction materials division. Estimated 180 MT at ~$1,150/MT. High priority — customer wants pricing by end of month.

activities.sourceLabel: Email thread: RE: Q1 Supply Agreement - HDPE inquiry
activities.summary: Erik followed up about HDPE containers. Mentioned they need 100 MT of blow molding grade HDPE. Referenced competitor pricing at $1,420/MT. Wants to consolidate suppliers.
Production planning call with AutoPoly. Confirmed March delivery schedule. Customer mentioned potential PET bottle expansion for Q3. Early stage — needs follow-up.
Received purchase order via email for INEOS Rigidex HD5218EA. PO specifies 150 MT at $1,345/MT, delivery by April 15. Payment terms Net 30.

activities.sourceLabel: Phone call with Ahmet Ozturk (Ankara Plastik)
activities.summary: Ahmet called to discuss expanding from pipe-grade HDPE to include PP fittings. Needs PPH grade for injection molding. Volume estimate 120 MT. Also mentioned interest in HDPE drums for chemical storage (small test volume ~60 MT).

activities.sourceLabel: Email: Meeting notes from Q1 review
activities.summary: Internal email from Sarah Chen summarizing the Q1 supply agreement review. Key takeaways: customer satisfaction high, pricing competitive, upsell opportunity for HDPE and PVC identified.
Carlos sent photos of competitor LLDPE film samples and asked if we can match quality. Mentioned they need UV-stabilized grade urgently for April planting season.

drafts.title: PVC rigid sheet for construction division
drafts.summary: Based on Zoom call with Erik Johansson (Mar 15). AutoPoly is launching a construction materials division and needs rigid PVC sheet. High priority — customer wants pricing by end of month.

drafts.title: Zoom call summary - Q2 supply planning
drafts.summary: Auto-generated meeting notes from the Zoom call with AutoPoly on March 15.

data.noteText:
**Zoom Call Summary - Mar 15, 2026**

Participants: Erik Johansson (AutoPoly), John Mitchell, Sarah Chen

**Key Discussion Points:**
1. Q2 supply needs confirmed — same volumes as Q1
2. New opportunity: PVC rigid sheet for construction division (~180 MT)
3. Erik wants pricing proposal by end of March
4. Customer satisfaction with current LDPE supply is high
5. Potential to consolidate more products under Vailent

**Action Items:**
- Send PVC pricing proposal (John)
- Schedule follow-up for HDPE containers (Sarah)
- Prepare Q2 forecast update

drafts.title: Email intelligence: Competitor pricing for HDPE
drafts.summary: Extracted competitive pricing intel from email thread with Erik Johansson.

data.noteText:
**Competitive Intelligence — HDPE Containers**

Source: Email from Erik Johansson (Mar 14)

- Competitor offering blow molding HDPE at $1,420/MT
- Customer wants to consolidate to fewer suppliers
- Volume: ~100 MT for industrial containers
- Opportunity to win by offering better service + bundled pricing with existing LDPE supply

drafts.title: PET bottle expansion (Q3)
drafts.summary: AutoPoly mentioned potential PET bottle expansion during Teams planning meeting. Early stage but worth tracking.

drafts.title: PO #PL-2026-0847 — INEOS Rigidex HD5218EA
drafts.summary: Purchase order received via email from Plastipack GmbH. Auto-extracted order details.

drafts.title: PP compound for injection molded fittings
drafts.summary: From phone call with Ahmet Ozturk. Ankara Plastik expanding into PP pipe fittings.

drafts.title: HDPE for blow molded drums (test volume)
drafts.summary: From same phone call. Small test volume for chemical storage drums.

drafts.title: Q1 review summary — key takeaways
drafts.summary: Summarized internal Q1 review email from Sarah Chen.

data.noteText:
**Q1 Supply Agreement Review**

Key takeaways from internal review:
- Customer satisfaction: High
- Pricing: Competitive vs market
- Delivery reliability: 98% on-time
- Upsell opportunities identified: HDPE containers, PVC construction
- Recommendation: Proactively offer bundled Q2 pricing

drafts.title: WhatsApp: Competitor LLDPE samples + urgent UV request
drafts.summary: Carlos Silva shared competitor film samples via WhatsApp. Urgent need for UV-stabilized grade.

data.noteText:
**WhatsApp from Carlos Silva (BrasilFilm) — Mar 9**

Carlos sent photos of competitor LLDPE film samples:
- Competitor is offering UV-stabilized LLDPE at competitive pricing
- BrasilFilm needs UV grade urgently for April planting season
- If we can match quality, they'll commit to 250 MT

**Action needed:** Expedite UV-stabilized DOWLEX 2045G sample and pricing
